faqs.question: What spider species are common in Throgs Neck homes?
faqs.answer: Throgs Neck residents typically encounter house spiders, cellar spiders, wolf spiders, and occasionally black widows in outdoor areas. The waterfront location also attracts fishing spiders near the Sound. Our technicians identify each species and apply appropriate control methods for complete elimination.
